subcodes.first_line: O Chosen One! Hearken unto the call of thy Lord, the All-Compelling, from the Divine Lote-Tree of Fire. Verily, there is none other God but Him, the All-Protecting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا مختار اسمع ندآء ربک الجبار من سدره النار انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @power of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc.
